parsed_review.summary: CP00-265 is a descriptor-only RP07 search-core closeout pack (40 units, RP07.P08.M02.S15-RP07.P08.M04.S12) that honestly claims production_ready=false / implemented_pending_review. Coverage and bindings match the baseline exactly (20 hermes_evidence, 16 implementation, 2 test, 2 claude_review; micro-phase counts M02:6, M03:22, M04:12), and are cross-guarded by deep-equality assertions in scripts/validate-rp07-search-core-contract.mjs and by unit tests in packages/search/test/model.test.js. All section rows are descriptor_only with runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false; freezeCp265Result and the CP265 no-write attestation assert no command/AI/search/OCR/index/embedding runtime, no state/audit/object-storage writes, no real data, and no permission/audit/blocked-claim/hermes-body/raw-payload leakage. Authority boundary holds: Claude is a read-only reviewer (read_only=true; tools Read/Grep/Glob only) and not the final approver (descriptor authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false; validators reject any Claude-final-approval or enterprise-trust-from-local-validation claim; human_final_approval_required=true). Hermes (H07) is used only for deterministic review packet/receipt descriptors (receipt_shape descriptor_only_*, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. CP178+ review hardening is in place: readiness auth-preflight passed with non-empty valid JSON, validation-report confirms allowed tools / prompt size / schema present and prohibits summary-only review, and forbidden_review_evidence enumerates auth-failure, zero-byte, malformed-JSON, fenced-JSON, tool-call-shaped, disabled-tools, missing-reference, and final-approval/mutation/enterprise-trust cases. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. One P3 informational note: post-review evidence artifacts are referenced but not yet present, which is the expected pre-commit state under the documented hardened_review_sequence.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts referenced but not yet present (expected, gated by hardened review sequence)
findings.details: Per-unit evidence_refs in the manifest and the review_hardening block in command-evidence.json reference claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, and review-receipt.json, none of which exist yet in docs/closeout-packs/cp00-265/ or artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-265/. This is consistent with the pack's status (implemented_pending_review, production_ready=false) and the documented hardened_review_sequence (read_only_claude_run_with_raw_capture -> receipt_normalization -> receipt_validation -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation -> commit): these artifacts are produced from this very review run and the subsequent gated steps. It is not a defect, but the human approver should confirm the post-review gated commands generate and validate these artifacts before commit.
findings.recommendation: Before committing CP00-265, run the post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:review:run/normalize/receipt:validate, closeout-pack-plan:generate, closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) so the referenced evidence artifacts are produced and validated. Do not flip production_ready to true or treat the enterprise trust claim as closed without human final approval, per the authority boundary.
